text: I bought a MacBook Pro M3 last week and the keyboard is completely unresponsive after the latest macOS update.
The Spotify Premium subscription I purchased yesterday is still not showing as active on my account.
Just wanted to say the new Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra works perfectly with your app. Amazing experience!
My Adobe Creative Cloud subscription was charged even though I cancelled it two months ago.
The Sony WH-1000XM5 headphones I received have a defective right ear cup — no sound comes from it.
I'm impressed by how smoothly Microsoft 365 integrates with your platform. Great job!
The Dell XPS 15 I ordered arrived with a cracked screen. I need a replacement sent immediately.
Trying to activate my Windows 11 Pro license but the key says it is already in use.
The Logitech MX Master 3 mouse I received matches the description exactly. Very satisfied.
My iPad Air keeps crashing when I try to open any document in your app. Very frustrating.
